title: goniophlebium erythrocarpum
intro: Goniophlebium erythrocarpum is a species of fern, a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Goniophlebium erythrocarpum include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are believed to offer relief from these conditions.
